title: Joz Krupa — Agentic AI Architecture and Innovation
summary: Primary Skills-lane positioning: Agentic AI architecture, enterprise intelligence, governance, context engineering, and multimodal AI orchestration.
claims: Joz has transitioned from large-scale digital and UX architecture into Agentic AI architecture and innovation.
His current focus includes reasoning, orchestration, RAG, embeddings, vector retrieval, memory, verification, event-driven AI, observability, and governance.
He connects technical AI architecture to measurable enterprise outcomes.
proof_points: Architected financial AI agents for MarketClue with live market data and asset portfolios.
Led HCD–AI, product, and data architectures for 20+ Dubai and Singapore FinTech initiatives.
Built on more than a decade of enterprise-scale product, engineering, and transformation experience.
